title: feat: add BYOP auth to elevator challenge
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Keys to the elevator
gist.blurb: The Sirius Cybernetics Elevator Challenge now supports Bring Your Own Pollen (BYOP) auth. Bring your own keys, the elevator is waiting.
gist.summary: Updated the Sirius Cybernetics Elevator Challenge app to use Bring Your Own Pollen (BYOP) authentication instead of hardcoded API keys.
gist.impact: Players can now connect their Pollinations account to play, with secure local storage keeping them logged in between sessions.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing a tiny bellhop hat, holding a glowing golden key (representing the API key/BYOP auth) next to a retro-futuristic elevator door. The monitor robot is happily waiting inside the elevator.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny bellhop hat, handing a glowing golden key to a chunky monitor-head robot inside a retro-futuristic elevator. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny bellhop hat, handing a glowing golden key to a chunky monitor-head robot inside a retro-futuristic elevator. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
